title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, November 30 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 30/11/2021
Image reference: 2021-11-30_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-november-30-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have remained stable. MR2 Arctic Bay (50,900 DWT, Mar 2006, STX Offshore) sold for USD 11.50 mil, VV value USD 10.89 mil. Small Clean Tanker Maria Theresa (4,500 DWT, Mar 2002, RMK Marine) sold to UAE buyers for USD 2.00 mil, VV value USD 2.85 mil - SS/DD Due.
